items.title: Premier League referee Taylor retires
items.summary: Long-serving Premier League referee Anthony Taylor is standing down after 16 years in England's top flight at the conclusion of the World Cup.

Erling Haaland celebrates birthday with stunning partner on yacht after taking over America at World Cup
items.summary: ERLING Haaland has celebrated his birthday with his stunning partner on a yacht. The Norway striker has taken time off after taking over America at the 2026 World Cup. items.title: West Ham agree big-money deal with Al Hilal for Summerville
items.summary: West Ham have reached an agreement with Al Hilal for the sale of Crysencio Summerville.

items.title: Aston Villa in talks to sign Garnacho
items.summary: Aston Villa are in talks to sign Alejandro Garnacho from Chelsea.

items.title: Consortium in talks to buy Liverpool minority stake
items.summary: A consortium led by British-Indian millionaire businessman Amit Bhatia expresses an interest in buying a minority stake in Liverpool.

items.title: Villa in talks to sign Chelsea's Garnacho
items.summary: Aston Villa enter talks to sign Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho on loan, with a potential obligation to buy.

items.title: Ipswich complete £20m deal for Ghana winger Fatawu
items.summary: Ipswich Town complete the £20m signing of Abdul Fatawu, who played in all four of Ghana's games at the World Cup.

items.title: Middlesbrough agree fee for Spurs striker Lankshear
items.summary: Middlesbrough agree a deal to could rise to a club-record £20m for Tottenham striker Will Lankshear.

items.title: Liverpool owner in talks to sell stake to QPR co-owner Amit Bhatia
items.summary: Bhatia backed by father-in-law Lakshmi Mittal Minority stake deal values the club at £4.5bn Liverpool’s owner is in talks over selling a significant minority stake to a consortium led by the Queens Park Rangers co-owner Amit Bhatia and backed by his father-in-law Lakshmi Mittal, the billionaire Indi

items.title: Al-Hilal HIJACK Man Utd and Aston Villa move for Crysencio Summerville as they agree £68MILLION transfer with West Ham
items.summary: SAUDI PRO LEAGUE giants Al-Hilal have agreed to sign Crysencio Summerville from West Ham. The 24-year-old had been heavily linked with a move to Roma in recent days, with Aston Villa and Manchester United also understood to be interested. But he now looks poised for a move to Saudi Arabia. Al-Hilal

items.title: Stokes scores century in first match for Durham after England retirement
items.summary: Former England captain Ben Stokes hit a match-winning hundred in his first appearance for Durham following his international retirement.

items.title: SunRisers thrash MI London in Hundred opener as Cross suffers injury scare
items.summary: SunRisers Leeds Women kicked off a new era for The Hundred with a seven-wicket win over MI London as two teams who have undergone name changes following heavy overseas investment met at The Kia Oval.

items.title: The defining moments of the 2026 World Cup
items.summary: From historic World Cup debuts and emotional first victories, to new stars and the brilliance of legends - relive the defining moments of the 2026 Fifa World Cup.
